summary: Iteration 12 - Complete testing of Copy Zone and Zone Style Controls features. Backend: 16/16 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All new features verified working - Copy Zone button appears in edit mode toolbar, Zone Edit Dialog shows comprehensive style controls (fill color, opacity, stroke color, opacity, width, style), live preview updates correctly, backend APIs accept and save all new fields.

backend: Auth login works with admin credentials
GET /api/map-sessions?floor_id=... - Feb 17 session exists with zones
Zones have stroke_width and stroke_style fields
PUT zone with fill_color saves correctly
PUT zone with opacity saves correctly
PUT zone with stroke_color saves correctly
PUT zone with stroke_opacity saves correctly
PUT zone with stroke_width saves correctly
PUT zone with stroke_style (solid/dashed/dotted) saves correctly
POST zone (copy) with offset and (نسخة) suffix works
Zone category change regression test passes
Zone polygon_points update regression test passes
frontend: Edit instruction text shows rotation/drag info
Zone selection shows blue border and red vertex handles
Purple rotation handle visible on selected zone
COPY BUTTON (نسخ) visible in edit mode toolbar when zone selected
REMOVE BUTTON (إزالة) visible alongside copy button
Copy button click duplicates zone with offset
Copy success toast: 'تم نسخ المنطقة' appears
Copied zone shows '(نسخة)' suffix in zones list
Each stroke style button has SVG preview line
Live preview rectangle shows current style settings
Previous features (pan, draw, rect, zoom, calendar) all working

seed_data_creation: Test copied zone was cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 tested: Copy Zone + Zone Style Controls. NEW features verified: 1) Copy Zone button (data-testid='edit-copy-zone-btn') with CopyPlus icon appears in edit mode toolbar when zone selected. Clicking it duplicates zone with +4px offset and '(نسخة)' suffix. 2) Zone Edit Dialog (on double-click) now includes 'تنسيق الشكل' (Shape Style) section with: fill color picker, fill opacity slider (5-100%), stroke color picker, stroke opacity slider (0-100%), stroke width slider (0.1-2.0), stroke style buttons (solid/dashed/dotted each with SVG preview). Live preview rectangle updates in real-time. All style changes auto-save via handleUpdateZoneStyle(). Backend SessionZone model has stroke_width (float, default 0.3) and stroke_style (str, default 'solid'). SessionZoneUpdate accepts all style fields. Feb 17 session has 3 original zones (1-0-1, 2-0-1, 3-0-1).

copy_zone_button.details: Copy button (نسخ) with CopyPlus icon visible in edit mode toolbar when zone selected. data-testid='edit-copy-zone-btn'

copy_zone_functionality.details: Clicking copy duplicates zone with +4px offset, zone_code '-copy' suffix, name_ar '(نسخة)' suffix. Toast confirms success.

style_controls_section.details: Zone Edit Dialog shows 'تنسيق الشكل' (Shape Style) section with all controls

fill_color_picker.details: Color picker input with data-testid='zone-fill-color', shows current zone fill color

fill_opacity_slider.details: Slider with data-testid='zone-fill-opacity', range 5-100%, shows percentage value

stroke_color_picker.details: Color picker input with data-testid='zone-stroke-color', shows current stroke color

stroke_opacity_slider.details: Slider with data-testid='zone-stroke-opacity', range 0-100%, shows percentage value

stroke_width_slider.details: Slider with data-testid='zone-stroke-width', range 0.1-2.0, shows numeric value

stroke_style_buttons.details: 3 buttons: solid (متصل), dashed (مقطع), dotted (نقطي). Each has SVG preview line. Selected style highlighted with emerald border.

live_preview.details: SVG rectangle preview updates in real-time showing current fill color, opacity, stroke color, opacity, width, and dash pattern

backend_api_support.details: SessionZoneUpdate model accepts stroke_width (float), stroke_style (str: solid/dashed/dotted). All style fields persist to database.

map_rendering.details: Map SVG uses zone.stroke_width and zone.stroke_style for strokeWidth and strokeDasharray attributes

regression_tests.details: Rotation, drag, pan, draw, rect, zoom, calendar, session list all working correctly
